body_content:
Hands-free. Always ready.

Built for people who move between the gym, errands, and everything in between without wanting to carry a bag.

  • 1L capacity fits phone, keys, cards
  • Water-repellent fabric
  • Adjustable strap wears crossbody or around the waist
  • Internal zip pocket
  • Available in 12 colors

Shop the Everywhere Belt Bag now.
seo_description: The Lululemon Everywhere Belt Bag holds your essentials hands-free. Water-repellent, 1L capacity, adjustable strap.
image_alt_text: Lululemon Everywhere Belt Bag in black worn crossbody

body_content:
Nothing feels like Align.

Designed for women who want maximum comfort during yoga, pilates, or low-impact movement.

  • Nulu fabric is buttery-soft and weightless
  • 28-inch inseam
  • Four-way stretch moves with you
  • Hidden waistband pocket
  • Available in 30 colors and sizes 0-20

Add to bag and feel the difference.
seo_description: The Lululemon Align Pant in Nulu fabric. Buttery-soft, weightless, and four-way stretch. Sizes 0-20.
image_alt_text: Lululemon Align High-Rise Pant in soft sand

body_content: When you step onto the course you want to feel confident and cool and ready to perform and the Metal Vent Tech Polo is made with our sweat-wicking Anti-Stink technology that keeps you fresh through 18 holes and the fabric has ventilation built in and it is stretchy enough that your swing stays unrestricted and it comes in classic colors that work on and off the course and you can pair it with the ABC Pant for a full look and it ships free on orders over 100 dollars.
This one is different. Our most-loved fleece, now in an oversized fit that works as hard as you do. Soft. Warm. The kind of thing you reach for every single day. Available in limited seasonal colors.
seo_description: The Lululemon Scuba Oversized Hoodie in soft fleece fabric. Limited seasonal colors.
image_alt_text: Lululemon Scuba Oversized Hoodie in opal

body_content: The ABC Pant Classic from Lululemon uses Warpstreme fabric which is a four-way stretch wrinkle-resistant machine-washable material that has been engineered for performance and the pant has a straight leg silhouette and an internal waistband and it is available in multiple colors and the technology inside is what makes it different from other pants on the market.
seo_description: The Lululemon ABC Pant with Warpstreme fabric. Four-way stretch, wrinkle-resistant, machine washable.
image_alt_text: Lululemon ABC Pant Classic in heathered black
